scripts.smoke: npm --prefix real_dev/backend run smoke && npm --prefix real_dev/frontend run smoke
scripts.e2e:mf2: npm --prefix real_dev/backend run seed:e2e && playwright test tests/e2e/mf2-flow.spec.js
scripts.e2e:mf4: npm --prefix real_dev/backend run seed:e2e:mf4 && playwright test tests/e2e/mf4-flow.spec.js
